title: Vrassh Slaughter
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Battle |prev= |conc= |next= |image= |name=Vrassh Slaughter |conflict= |date=Before [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]''[[Specter of the Past]]'' |place=[[Pas'sic]] |result=Massacre of the [[Vrassh]] |side1=[[Pas'sic (group)|Pas'sic]] |side2=[[Vrassh]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1= |forces2= |forces3= |forces4= |casual1= |casual2=Heavy |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|They signify remembrance for the victims of the Vrassh Slaughter. The land the perpetrators gained by that act has yielded great wealth to them; yet neither the Pas'sic government nor the New Republic has insisted that any of that wealth be given to the survivors' families, as both the custom and ancient law of that world demand.''"
"''One of my Jedi students was of the Vrassh. He had a great deal of anger to work through before his training could properly begin.|[[Moshene Tre]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|}} The '''Vrassh Slaughter''' was a [[Speciecide|large-scale slaughter]] of the [[Vrassh]] by the [[Pas'sic (group)|Pas'sic]]. By [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], neither the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] nor the Pas'sic government had compensated the survivors. ==Appearances== *''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Matanza Vrassh }} [[Category:Battles in the Oricho sector]] [[Category:Genocides and massacres]]
